title: RESOURCETIMEOUT
text: RESOURCETIMEOUT Specifies the maximum time, in minutes, that downloadable resources are cached by the WRD before they are deleted from the server. <init-param> <param-name> RESOURCETIMEOUT </param-name> <param-value> Minutes </param-value> </init-param> Default value if omitted: 5 Related Links web.xml Configuration file of the web application.
